headline: The Troubled Century: Al Gore wins after full Florida recount

events.title: 2000 US Presidential Election
events.description: Al Gore wins after full Florida recount
events.explanation: Butterfly ballot confusion resolved, Gore carries Florida by ~2,000 votes

events.title: Dot-Com Crash Aftermath
events.description: Recession triggers financial regulation reform
events.explanation: Sarbanes-Oxley expanded; derivatives regulation strengthened

events.title: September 11 Attacks
events.description: 1-2 flights hit targets; others intercepted or failed
events.explanation: Earlier FAA response or passenger awareness prevents full attack

events.title: China Joins WTO
events.description: China rejected from WTO; pursues bilateral trade

events.title: Post-9/11 Security Architecture
events.description: Full Patriot Act, DHS creation, TSA, warrantless surveillance programs

events.title: Opioid Crisis
events.description: Purdue Pharma criminally prosecuted in 2004

events.title: Columbia Shuttle Disaster
events.description: Shuttle destroyed on re-entry; program eventually ends

events.title: Iraq War Decision
events.description: UN inspections continue; no military action taken
events.explanation: Inspectors given more time; WMD claims debunked before invasion

events.title: Post-Genome Era
events.description: Genetic discrimination becomes major issue; insurance and employers use genetic data

events.title: BRICS / Emerging Market Boom
events.description: BRICS economies boom 2003-2011, then stagnate except China

events.title: Social Media Emergence

events.title: Drone Warfare Program

events.title: Record Hurricane Season

events.title: Indian Ocean Tsunami
events.description: 230K dead across 14 countries; no warning system existed

events.title: Hurricane Katrina Response

events.explanation: Pre-positioned assets and faster evacuation

events.title: Katrina Racial Reckoning
events.description: Mass racial justice movement emerges in 2006-2008

events.title: Cloud Computing / AWS
events.description: AWS, Azure, GCP dominate; hyperscaler model wins

events.title: North Korea Nuclear

events.title: Smartphone Revolution

events.description: US becomes energy independent by 2019; largest oil and gas producer

events.title: Beijing Olympics

events.title: 2008 Financial Crisis

events.explanation: Fed acts more aggressively in March 2008

events.title: 2008 US Presidential Election
events.description: Barack Obama wins presidency; first Black president

events.title: Twitter Becomes Political Infrastructure
events.description: Open protocol wins; no single company controls political discourse
events.explanation: Federated microblogging (like Mastodon) gains traction early

events.title: Haiti Earthquake
events.description: Red Cross and NGO failures dominate the narrative

events.title: Collapse of Local Journalism
events.description: ProPublica-style nonprofit journalism scales to fill the local news gap
events.explanation: Philanthropic funding and community support create sustainable local outlets

events.title: Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill
events.description: Stricter MMS oversight catches blowout preventer failure before disaster

events.title: Euro Sovereign Debt Crisis
events.description: Troika-imposed austerity; slow recovery; Greek suffering

events.title: SpaceX and Reusable Rocketry
events.description: SpaceX succeeds with Falcon 9; reusable rocketry slashes launch costs by 10x
events.explanation: Falcon 9 flies 2010, first landing 2015; opens commercial space era

events.title: Stuxnet / Cyber Warfare

events.title: WikiLeaks / Information Warfare

events.title: Arab Spring
events.description: Tunisia succeeds; Egypt coup; Libya/Syria civil war

events.title: Fukushima Nuclear Disaster
events.description: Three reactor meltdowns; global nuclear retreat

events.title: Libya Intervention
events.description: No Western intervention; Gaddafi suppresses revolt

events.title: Bin Laden Operation
events.description: Navy SEAL raid in Abbottabad kills bin Laden; body buried at sea

events.title: US Debt Ceiling Crises

events.title: Solar Cost Revolution

events.title: Occupy Wall Street
events.description: Occupy triggers anti-protest legislation and public backlash

events.title: Instagram / Visual Social Media
events.description: Instagram drives teen mental health crisis through comparison culture and body image pressure

events.title: YouTube Recommendation Radicalization
events.description: YouTube identifies and fixes the radicalization pipeline by 2015
events.explanation: Internal research leads to algorithm changes prioritizing quality over engagement

events.title: ZIRP Era / Quantitative Easing

events.title: Deep Learning / AlexNet Breakthrough
events.description: Deep learning works but adoption is gradual

events.description: Reform faction maintains collective leadership

events.title: Sandy Hook / Gun Control
events.description: Manchin-Toomey passes; assault weapons restricted nationwide

events.title: Streaming and Media Fragmentation
events.description: PBS/BBC model scales; shared reference points and trusted journalism maintained
events.explanation: Public media investment grows; serves as common ground across political divides

events.title: Pope Francis Election
events.description: Francis elected; Laudato Si shifts Catholic discourse on climate and inequality

events.title: Boston Marathon Bombing

events.title: Snowden Revelations
events.description: No major surveillance leak occurs

events.title: Syria Red Line

events.title: Bitcoin / Cryptocurrency

events.title: Deaths of Despair / Life Expectancy

events.title: ISIS Rise

events.title: Gamergate / Online Harassment Weaponization

events.description: US cyber deterrence prevents the attack

events.title: Africa Development

events.title: Antibiotic Resistance Escalation

events.title: Marriage Equality / Gender Politics

events.title: Iran Nuclear Deal / JCPOA

events.title: European Refugee Crisis

events.title: Paris Attacks / ISIS Terror

events.title: WhatsApp as Political Misinformation Vector

events.explanation: India and Brazil mandate message origin tracking; reduces viral misinformation

events.title: Ransomware as Business Model
events.description: Ransomware grows to $20B+/year criminal industry

events.title: Self-Driving Cars

events.title: Panama Papers
events.description: Papers spark outrage; some leaders resign but systemic reform is limited

events.title: Paris Agreement Implementation
events.description: Major emitters exceed NDC targets; 1.5C pathway viable
